title: Festive Tender Korean Egg Spring Rolls
description: Crispy Korean-style egg spring rolls filled with tender, flavorful ingredients, perfect for a festive meal. Inspired by the Jeolla province of South Korea.

ingredients.name: Large egg roll wrappers (about 20 wrappers)
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Cured pork belly
ingredients.notes: look for a Korean-style cured pork belly or substitute with regular pork belly

ingredients.name: Kimchi
ingredients.notes: homemade or store-bought kimchi works well

ingredients.name: Cilantro
ingredients.notes: chopped cilantro adds a fresh flavor

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced green onions add crunch and flavor

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: Korean chili paste adds depth and heat

ingredients.name: Sesame oil
ingredients.notes: sesame oil adds a nutty flavor

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: brown sugar adds a touch of sweetness

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: black pepper adds a subtle kick

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the cured pork belly, kimchi, cilantro, green onions, gochujang, sesame oil, soy sauce, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to combine.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface with one corner pointing towards you.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the pork belly mixture in the center of the egg roll wrapper.
Brush the edges of the egg roll wrapper with a small amount of water.
Fold the bottom corner of the egg roll wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining egg roll wrappers and filling.
Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the spring rolls to the skillet and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Repeat with the remaining spring rolls.
Remove the spring rolls from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the spring rolls hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
